mutation.notes: Neither mutmut nor cosmic-ray found. Install one to enable mutation scoring.

plumbing_porcelain_separation.reasoning: Clear plumbing layer (write_object, read_object, make_tree, read_tree, make_commit, read_commit) with commands delegating to these. Minor violations in cmd_merge (inline commit construction) and cmd_checkout (direct HEAD write).

object_model_abstraction.reasoning: Commit and TreeEntry dataclasses exist, but no class-based serialize/deserialize methods — serialization logic is in standalone functions. Blob has no abstraction.

naming_consistency.reasoning: Highly consistent: cmd_* for commands, verb_noun for plumbing, sha for digests. Minor asymmetry: make_commit/make_tree vs read_commit/read_tree.

test_quality.reasoning: Tests verify real behavior: SHA1 format, zlib compression, deduplication, corrupt objects, binary files, parent linkage, log ordering. Missing: unicode filenames, files with spaces, empty repo edge cases.

scope_discipline.reasoning: Covers init/add/commit/log/status/branch plus merge/diff/reset/stash. File truncated mid-function (cmd_checkout). .gitignore support and three-way-merge are reasonable extensions.
